tests.name: ci_workflow_created
tests.details: .github/workflows/ci.yml present.

tests.name: release_workflow_created
tests.details: FAIL — .github/workflows/release.yml MISSING. init.sh logged: 'No release pipeline template for platform mcp_server on host github. Skipping release pipeline.' Root cause: lookup uses templates/pipelines/release/github/$PLATFORM.yml where $PLATFORM=mcp_server, but template file is named mcp-server.yml (hyphen, not underscore).

tests.name: framework_clone_present
tests.details: .claude/framework dir present (CDF v4.2.3 commit f55c8bc).

tests.name: context7_detection
tests.details: verify-install.sh from $PROJECT_DIR reports '[OK] Context7 MCP installed' and '[OK] Context7 MCP configured'.

tests.name: platform_module_present
tests.details: FAIL — docs/platform-modules/mcp_server.md MISSING (directory exists but is empty). init.sh logged: 'No platform module for mcp_server. The Builder's Guide works standalone.' Root cause: init.sh line 1124 looks up $SCRIPT_DIR/docs/platform-modules/${PLATFORM}.md (=mcp_server.md), but framework actually ships the file as mcp-server.md (hyphen). verify-install.sh then warns 'Platform module (mcp_server.md) missing' and even tells the user 'Copy from orchestrator: docs/platform-modules/mcp_server.md', which is the wrong filename — the framework copy is mcp-server.md.

tests.name: no_residual_backup_dir
tests.details: No .claude-backup directory after init.

tests.details: .claude/settings.json PreToolUse[Bash] hooks include scripts/pre-commit-gate.sh.

tests.name: stop_checklist_registered
tests.details: .claude/settings.json Stop hooks include .claude/framework/hooks/stop-checklist.sh.

tests.name: pending_approval_helper_copied
tests.details: scripts/pending-approval.sh present (PR #17 fix verified — was U-H bug).

tests.name: lint_uat_scenarios_helper_copied
tests.details: scripts/lint-uat-scenarios.sh present (PR #17 fix verified — was U-H bug).

tests.name: framework_self_guard_active
tests.details: Running init.sh from $FRAMEWORK exits 1 with '[FAIL] Refusing to operate inside the Solo Orchestrator framework repo' message (PR #18 fix verified).

framework_bugs.summary: release.yml missing for mcp_server platform — template name uses hyphen, lookup uses underscore
framework_bugs.reproduction: bash $FRAMEWORK/init.sh --non-interactive --project uat-agent-11 --platform mcp_server --deployment personal --language python --git-host other --remote-url https://example.com/fake.git --branch-protection-attested ...; observe stdout 'No release pipeline template for platform mcp_server on host github. Skipping release pipeline.' and ls .github/workflows/ shows only ci.yml.
framework_bugs.expected: init.sh creates .github/workflows/release.yml from the mcp-server.yml template (which exists at templates/pipelines/release/github/mcp-server.yml).
framework_bugs.actual: init.sh skips release pipeline generation because it computes $release_template = templates/pipelines/release/github/mcp_server.yml (underscore) but the on-disk file is mcp-server.yml (hyphen). init.sh:2310. Affects every mcp_server-platform project on github/gitlab/bitbucket hosts; the same hyphen-vs-underscore mismatch will reproduce for all three host driver dirs.

framework_bugs.summary: Platform module not copied for mcp_server — same hyphen/underscore mismatch
framework_bugs.reproduction: Same init.sh invocation as above; ls docs/platform-modules/ inside the project shows the directory is empty.
framework_bugs.expected: init.sh copies docs/platform-modules/mcp-server.md from the framework into the project's docs/platform-modules/.
framework_bugs.actual: init.sh:1124 looks up $SCRIPT_DIR/docs/platform-modules/${PLATFORM}.md = mcp_server.md, which doesn't exist (file is mcp-server.md). Logs 'No platform module for mcp_server. The Builder's Guide works standalone.' verify-install.sh then reports 'Platform module (mcp_server.md) missing → Copy from orchestrator: docs/platform-modules/mcp_server.md' — but mcp_server.md doesn't exist in the framework either; the user has to know the file is actually mcp-server.md. Documentation gap compounds the bug.

framework_bugs.summary: U-C confirmation: direct git commit bypasses BL-006 commit-msg gate
framework_bugs.reproduction: After --record-feature uat-feat-1 + complete-step build_loop:feature_recorded, with NO --start-feature for a new feature, run: git commit --allow-empty -m 'feat(bl006-trigger): no loop'. Commit succeeds.
framework_bugs.expected: BL-006 should block feat: commit when no Build Loop is active. PreToolUse path (pre-commit-gate.sh) does block — verified separately by piping JSON to it — but a direct shell git commit bypasses PreToolUse entirely (no commit-msg hook installed).
framework_bugs.actual: Direct git commit succeeds with feat: subject and no recorded loop. Confirms U-C from prior sweep — fix requires installing a git commit-msg hook (or pre-commit framework) that calls process-checklist.sh --check-commit-message in addition to the PreToolUse path.

framework_bugs.summary: U-D confirmation: no script advances current_phase after gate passes
framework_bugs.reproduction: Complete all phase1_architecture steps, then phase3_validation steps, then phase4_release steps. Run check-phase-gate.sh at each transition. .claude/phase-state.json .current_phase remains 0 throughout.
framework_bugs.expected: After successful gate passage and approval logging, .current_phase should advance (1, 2, 3, 4 / 'released').
framework_bugs.actual: .current_phase stays at 0. check-phase-gate.sh reports 'Phase gates consistent.' but does no writes. process-checklist.sh has no --advance-phase / --close-phase command. Confirms U-D from prior sweep.

documentation_gaps.gap: verify-install.sh tells user 'Copy from orchestrator: docs/platform-modules/mcp_server.md' but the actual framework filename is mcp-server.md (hyphen). Misleads users into looking for a file that does not exist.
documentation_gaps.where: scripts/verify-install.sh — Manual remediation hint for missing platform module

documentation_gaps.gap: init.sh --help-non-interactive lists --platform values as 'desktop, mobile, web, mcp_server' (underscore) but framework's release-pipeline templates and platform-module files use hyphenated names (mcp-server). The mismatch is silent: missing artifacts are logged as INFO rather than FAIL, so users may not notice the regression.

tests.name: start_phase1_exits_zero
tests.details: process-checklist.sh --start-phase1 exit 0; '[OK] Phase 1 architecture planning started'.

tests.name: phase1_steps_array_present
tests.details: jq '.phase1_architecture.steps_completed' returns [].

tests.name: each_phase1_step_completes
tests.details: All 5 PHASE1_STEPS (architecture_selected, threat_model_complete, data_model_defined, ui_scaffolding_done, bible_synthesized) completed sequentially with exit 0.

tests.name: phase1_to_phase2_gate_passes
tests.details: check-phase-gate.sh reports 'Phase gates consistent.' (no auto-block). check-gate.sh --preflight after backfill-host returns 'Not ready: protection verification failed' — expected for fake remote (host=other has no protection-verification path).

tests.name: phase_state_advances_to_2
tests.details: U-D regression: no script advances current_phase after gate passes. Recorded as Medium framework_bug.

documentation_gaps.gap: check-gate.sh --backfill-host requires interactive 'y' confirmation but is invoked from non-interactive contexts (e.g., post-init scripts, UAT). When stdin is non-TTY it should either auto-confirm based on the inferred host or accept a --yes flag. Currently the user gets 'Aborted — no changes made' and check-gate.sh --preflight then fails until interactive backfill is done.

tests.name: start_feature_records_state
tests.details: .build_loop.feature = 'uat-feat-1' after --start-feature.

tests.name: each_step_completes_in_order
tests.details: tests_written → tests_verified_failing → implemented → security_audit (with feature-specific audit doc) → documentation_updated → feature_recorded all exit 0.

tests.name: pre_commit_passes_after_loop
tests.details: git add -A && git commit -m 'feat(uat-1): stub feature for UAT' succeeded after all 5 build steps.

tests.name: bl006_blocks_feat_without_loop
tests.details: Direct shell git commit with feat: subject succeeded with no active loop. PreToolUse path WOULD block (verified by piping JSON), but a shell-direct git commit bypasses PreToolUse. Recorded as U-C confirmation framework_bug (Medium).

tests.name: bl006_grace_window_resets_after_record
tests.details: After --record-feature uat-feat-1 + feature_recorded step, started uat-feat-2 with full build loop, ran git commit -m 'feat(uat-2): grace-window check' — succeeded. PR #17 grace-window reset verified working.

tests.name: bl015_sentinel_blocks_commit
tests.details: Wrote .claude/pending-approval.json, simulated PreToolUse via stdin JSON to scripts/pre-commit-gate.sh — output 'permissionDecision: deny' with 'pre-commit gate: commit blocked — pending user decision'. (Direct git commit does NOT block because no commit-msg hook is installed — same shape as U-C, but the hook contract is PreToolUse-only by design.)

tests.name: bl015_sentinel_resolves
tests.details: scripts/pending-approval.sh --resolve removed the sentinel (exit 0). Subsequent PreToolUse simulation produced no deny output (allow).

tests.name: recorded_feature_appears_in_progress
tests.details: jq '.features_completed' .claude/build-progress.json contains 'uat-feat-1' (and 'uat-feat-2' after second loop).

tests.name: start_phase3_exits_zero
tests.details: process-checklist.sh --start-phase3 exit 0 (after 'Phase 2→3 has warnings. User attestation required.' info — expected because of the testing-required state from BL-006 build-progress).

tests.name: start_uat_creates_session
tests.details: .uat_session.started_at = '2026-04-26T01:33:59Z'.

tests.name: uat_template_lints_clean
tests.details: scripts/lint-uat-scenarios.sh against the framework's templates/uat/test-session-template.html exits 1 with the expected '__PLACEHOLDER__ unreplaced' violations — i.e., linter is functioning correctly. (Lints clean only after a populated template; our test file is the unfilled template, so 21 placeholder violations are expected and prove the linter works.)

tests.name: no_uncommitted_secrets
tests.details: Greps for password/api[_-]?key/secret/token in committed files match only documentation references (docs/reference/*.md, evaluation-prompts/*.md) and shell variable assignments like PHASE_STATE=, MATRIX_DIR=. No actual secrets.

tests.name: log_files_consistent
tests.details: N/A — .claude/process-audit.log absent; no FORCE/reset events occurred during this run.

tests.name: no_orphaned_tempfiles

tests.name: no_framework_contamination
tests.details: git -C $FRAMEWORK status --short shows only the pre-existing untracked .claude/ and Reports/uat-2026-04-26/ entries (unchanged from setup). git -C $FRAMEWORK rev-parse HEAD = d66e8f276079aa352ba90ac54386e1b1896d7494, identical to setup capture.

summary: Init succeeded for personal/mcp_server/standard, but two High-severity bugs surfaced from the same hyphen-vs-underscore mismatch: release.yml not generated and platform module not copied (template/file names use 'mcp-server', code looks up 'mcp_server'). Build Loop, BL-015 sentinel, and PR #17/#18/#19 fixes verified working through PreToolUse path. U-C and U-D confirmed still-open from prior sweep.
